SEARCH
Package org.javalabs.jpa.dialect.postgres

Class TableMetadata

java.lang.Object
org.javalabs.jpa.dialect.postgres.TableMetadata
@Entity public class TableMetadata extends Object
Represents metadata for a database table.

Aggregates information about table name, columns, primary keys, indexes, and constraints.

Commonly used in schema extraction, ORM frameworks, and code generation tools.

Author:
Sudiptasish Chanda
